Video.summary: Bob paints a cabin in snowy woods.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Snowy Morn

Video.summary: Bob paints a waterfall.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Waterfall in the Woods

Video.summary: Using only gray and white to paint a cabin amid frozen mountains.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Shades of Gray

Video.summary: Bob paints a valley and mountains.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Valley of Tranquility

Video.summary: Bob paints a tranquil lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Quiet Mountain Lake

Video.summary: The fall breeze rustles in the trees and skips across crisp still waters.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Autumn Splendor

Video.summary: Bob paints a covered bridge in an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Covered Bridge Oval

Video.summary: Bob paints a waterfall beneath a glacier.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Towering Glacier

Video.summary: Bob paints evergreens overlooking flowers.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Daisy Delight

Video.summary: Bob places an oval sunset within a square.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Sunset Oval

Video.summary: Bob paints a tree beside a stream.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Hidden Stream

Video.summary: Bob frames a pretty barn within an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Oval Barn

Video.summary: As the night settles over a rocky coast, a warm glow of the ending day still sits in the sky.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Ebony Sea

Video.summary: Bob paints a pleasant valley.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Camper's Haven

Video.summary: The glistening sun peeks through the trees in this wintry scene; Bob Ross creates a cold day warmed by daystar radiance.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Sun

Video.summary: A path of cacti and rocks leads right up to a bold sun setting in a dramatic red sky.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Cactus at Sunset

Video.summary: A scenic world of green trees and bushes reflecting into calm waters.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Meadow Lake

Video.summary: A woodland scene lit by the waning rays of the sun.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Final Embers of Sunlight

Video.summary: Bob paints a waterfall.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Wilderness Falls

Video.summary: Bob paints a scene with sun and shadows.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Sunlight in the Shadows

Video.summary: Bob paints purple skies.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Sunset Aglow

Video.summary: Bob paints a lush island.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Island Paradise

Video.summary: Bob paints a snow scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Splendor of a Snowy Winter

Video.summary: Bob paints flowers at sunrise.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Daisies at Dawn

Video.summary: Bob paints in warm hues.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Golden Glow of Morning

Video.summary: Bob paints a breathtaking scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: A Spectacular View

Video.summary: Bob paints a river in the woods.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Forest River

Video.summary: Bob paints a sunrise scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Daybreak

Video.summary: Bob paints a farm in winter.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter at the Farm

Video.summary: Painting a golden sunset on a black canvas.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Golden Sunset

Video.summary: Bob paints a picturesque barn.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Roadside Barn

Video.summary: Bob creates a glowing effect on a lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Golden Glow

Video.summary: Bob creates a path beside a misty lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Lakeside Path

Video.summary: Bob paints a seaside sunset.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Sunset Over the Waves

Video.summary: Bob paints an isolated, snow-covered barn.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Barn

Video.summary: Bob paints a difficult seascape.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain by the Sea

Video.summary: Glowing red peaks loom over a lazy stream.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Nature's Paradise

Video.summary: Bob uses black and white base coats.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Hideaway

Video.summary: Warm summer mountain water and luxurious green grass.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Brown Mountain

Video.summary: A slow river winds around colorful foliage, with the final embers of sunlight ahead.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Black River
